Product pages and docs.

Keep the listing simple. Each project becomes its own permanent documentation page.

active

ferrosite

The static site generator behind matthias-kainer.de. Designed for understandable content pipelines, HTML-first output, and lightweight deployment.

Rust MiniJinja Markdown Cloudflare Workers

Ferrosite keeps content in files, pages in templates, and deployment boring enough to trust.

Built with ferrosite.
